Research.assistantHello:
Hello! I'm LexAI, your legal research assistant. I can help you research legal principles, analyze case law concepts, and organize your findings. Note: AI integration is coming soon — for now, I can provide structured legal information.

What legal topic would you like to explore today?
Research.assistantNew: Hello! Starting a new research session. What legal topic can I help you with?

Notes.title: My Notes
Notes.subtitle: {notesCount} notes across {categoriesCount} categories
Notes.tryDifferent: Try a different search or category
Notes.n1Excerpt: A valid contract requires: offer, acceptance, consideration, intention to create legal relations, and capacity of parties.
Notes.n2Excerpt: Mens rea refers to the mental state or intention of a person while committing a crime. Types: intention, recklessness, negligence.
Notes.n3Excerpt: The Donoghue v Stevenson case established the neighbour principle. Duty of care exists where harm is reasonably foreseeable.
Notes.n4Excerpt: Data subjects have the right to erasure (right to be forgotten) under specific conditions outlined in GDPR Article 17.
Notes.n5Excerpt: While freedom of speech is a fundamental right, it is subject to limitations when it conflicts with other rights or public order.
Notes.n6Excerpt: Capital gains tax is applied on the profit from selling an asset. Exemptions and rates vary by jurisdiction and asset type.
